{% extends "!page.html" %} {% block body %} {% if current_version and latest_version and current_version != latest_version %} {%- set current_clean = current_version.name.replace('.0', '') %} {%- set latest_clean = latest_version.name.replace('.0', '') %}

📋 Documentation Version Notice

{% if current_version.is_released %} You're reading documentation for {{ current_clean }}, which is an older version. For up-to-date information, please have a look at {{ latest_clean }} (Latest). {% else %} You're reading the documentation for a development version ({{ current_clean }}). For the latest released version, please have a look at {{ latest_clean }}. {% endif %}
